title: ForgeBrain Render Job and Video Package
description: The structured job-tracking object (RenderJob) and the resulting finished-video artifact (VideoPackage) produced by the Renderer. Produced after Asset Management and consumed by the Reviewer. See render-spec.md for the full process this schema supports. This schema defines contracts only — no rendering/encoding logic.

job_id.description: Unique identifier for this render job.

topic_id.description: Matches the topic_id of the storyboard/voice/subtitle/asset inputs this job renders.

started_at.description: Null until status transitions past queued.

completed_at.description: Null until status is completed or failed.

error_message.description: Populated only when status is failed.

failed_at_scene_id.description: The scene_id being rendered when a failure occurred, where determinable. Null if not applicable or not determinable.

package_id.description: Unique identifier for this finished video artifact.

based_on_render_job_id.description: The job_id of the RenderJob that produced this package. A VideoPackage only exists when that job's status is completed.

video_file_uri.description: Storage location of the final rendered video (e.g. a Cloud Storage URI).

thumbnail_frame_uri.description: Storage location of the extracted thumbnail frame — see render-spec.md Section 5 for selection logic.

duration_seconds.description: Final video duration. Should equal voice_result.total_actual_duration_seconds plus any fixed intro/outro padding.

checksum.description: Integrity checksum (e.g. SHA-256) of the video file.
